L1.area: PDF content model loading and document data parsing

L2.description: An XML external entity (XXE) vulnerability exists where an XML parser processes input without disabling external entity resolution. An attacker who can supply crafted XML content can exploit this to read arbitrary files from the server or perform server-side request forgery.

L3.area: XFA form data model loading and XML parsing within the PDF inspection tooling
L3.description: An XML external entity (XXE) vulnerability exists where the SAX-based XML parser used to load XFA form data from PDF documents does not disable external entity resolution. An attacker who can supply a crafted PDF containing malicious XFA XML content can exploit this to read arbitrary files or perform server-side request forgery.

ground_truth.reason: The SAXReader used to parse XFA XML data from PDF files does not set an entity resolver or disable external entities, allowing an attacker to include malicious external entity declarations in crafted XFA content.
